---
title: "Infrared and Raman perspectives on vibrational coupling in liquid water"
author: ["Hamish Haggard", "Yair Litman", "Stuart C. Althorpe"]
date: 2026-04-14
publication: "J. Chem. Phys. **164**, 144120 (2026)"
categories: ["spectroscopy", "water", "quantum_dynamics"]
url_source: https://doi.org/10.1063/5.0325115
url_preprint:
journ: "Journal of Chemical Physics"
issue: 164
page: "144120"
year: 2026
image: featured.png
pub_number: 34
---
